title: Injunction or other writ granted only on rule nisi
doc_html:
§1646.  Injunction or other writ granted only on rule nisi

No injunction or other writ to prevent or delay the creation, organization or reclamation of any drainage or sub-drainage district created under this Part shall be granted or issued except upon a rule nisi.
doc_text:
§1646.  Injunction or other writ granted only on rule nisi
No injunction or other writ to prevent or delay the creation, organization or reclamation of any drainage or sub-drainage district created under this Part shall be granted or issued except upon a rule nisi.
